author: y4rr
content: pw=10 retrain saturates pos_weight lever: F1 0.6144 (lower than pw=3=0.676), inference matches pw=5. The pos_weight knob has clearly hit diminishing returns on the 1.5M trace. Final shipped pareto unchanged — best operating points: 57% savings @ cos 0.88 (pw=3 t=-2.5), 31% savings @ cos 0.95 (pw=3 topk=18), 18% savings @ cos 0.97 (pw=3 h=2048 t=-3). To break through: capture trace with plainact criterion (gradient × activation) per internal tooling
